agents.backstory_hint: Analytical support specialist with a focus on rapid classification and risk detection.
agents.goal: Read incoming tickets, label them by category, and detect urgent issues.

agents.backstory_hint: Reliable systems monitor who ensures critical incidents are never missed.
agents.goal: Trigger immediate alerts for high-priority issues via PagerDuty.

agents.backstory_hint: Data-oriented analyst who excels at distilling large volumes of tickets into actionable insights.
agents.goal: Compile a weekly summary of ticket trends and volume.

ambiguities: Should the report be emailed, posted to Slack, or saved as a document in a specific system?
assumptions: The weekly report is generated on a set schedule at the end of the week.
Urgent criteria includes keywords like 'down', 'broken', 'can't login', or 'losing money'.

tasks.description: Read the Zendesk ticket content and categorize it as bug, billing, or question, while checking for urgency keywords.
tasks.expected_output: Category label and an urgency status (boolean).

tasks.description: If the ticket is marked as urgent, trigger an immediate notification via PagerDuty.
tasks.expected_output: Confirmation of PagerDuty alert if triggered.

tasks.description: Aggregate all tickets received during the week to produce a report on category volume and trends.
tasks.expected_output: A weekly summary document showing counts of bugs, billing, and questions with noted spikes.

tools.name: Zendesk Connector
tools.purpose: Read ticket content and update ticket labels.

tools.name: PagerDuty Notifier
tools.purpose: Send urgent notifications to the on-call engineer.

workflow.description: Categorize incoming Zendesk support tickets, alert on-call staff for urgent issues, and generate a weekly analytical summary.
workflow.name: Support Ticket Triage and Reporting
workflow.trigger: A new ticket arrives in Zendesk.
